name: @gjsify/integration-mcp-inspector-cli
description: End-to-end integration tests using the official @modelcontextprotocol/inspector CLI as a black-box client against the GJS and Node builds of examples/node/net-mcp-server. Catches regressions in @gjsify/http that only show up under the inspector's exact request shape (the trigger of the original SIGSEGV).

scripts.test: yarn prebuild:test && yarn build:test && yarn test:node

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
